page_description: Manage feature flags across all tenants (Owner only)

intro.title: How feature flags work
intro.description_html: Each flag resolves to one of three values for a given tenant: a global override (forces a value across every tenant), a per-tenant override (a custom value just for this tenant), or the default defined in code.
intro.precedence: Precedence: global override > per-tenant override > default.

legend.global_override: Forced on or off for every tenant

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.select_prompt: Select a tenant to view and manage feature flags

system_tenant.title: Global Feature Flags
system_tenant.description: You are viewing the system tenant. Use the controls below to set global overrides that affect all tenants at once. This is useful for enabling or disabling features platform-wide.

global_override.title: Global Override (affects all tenants)
global_override.no_override: No global override - using per-tenant settings
global_override.button_clear_title: Clear global override - use per-tenant settings
global_override.cannot_change_warning: This flag has a global override - cannot be changed per-tenant

warning.global_override_description: This flag is globally {{status}} for all tenants. Tenant-specific settings are ignored. Go to System (Platform Owners) tenant to change the global override.
